_comment: Flat test catalog: 8 leaf features, no groups. Eliminates feature occlusion from overlapping parent/child target directions.

features.description: Token is a period or full stop
Token is a preposition (in, on, at, of, for, with, to, from, by)
Token is a pronoun (he, she, it, they, we, I, you, him, her)
Token is a determiner or article (the, a, an, this, that)
Token starts with an uppercase letter
Token is 1-2 characters long (excluding leading space)
